linear_analogue_scale_before.description: Linear analogue scale (cm) for itching assessment, averaged over the two-day period before aspirin treatment. This variable and linear_analogue_scale_during and linear_analogue_scale_after are measurements of the same outcome on the same 13 patients across three time periods.

linear_analogue_scale_during.description: Linear analogue scale (cm) for itching assessment, averaged over the two-day period during aspirin treatment. Same outcome as linear_analogue_scale_before and linear_analogue_scale_after, measured on the same 13 patients.

linear_analogue_scale_after.description: Linear analogue scale (cm) for itching assessment, averaged over the two-day period after aspirin treatment. Same outcome as linear_analogue_scale_before and linear_analogue_scale_during, measured on the same 13 patients.

nocturnal_limb_movements_before.description: Nocturnal limb movements (scratching measure) averaged over the two-day period before aspirin treatment. This variable and nocturnal_limb_movements_during and nocturnal_limb_movements_after are measurements of the same outcome on the same 13 patients across three time periods.

nocturnal_limb_movements_during.description: Nocturnal limb movements (scratching measure) averaged over the two-day period during aspirin treatment. Same outcome as nocturnal_limb_movements_before and nocturnal_limb_movements_after, measured on the same 13 patients.

nocturnal_limb_movements_after.description: Nocturnal limb movements (scratching measure) averaged over the two-day period after aspirin treatment. Same outcome as nocturnal_limb_movements_before and nocturnal_limb_movements_during, measured on the same 13 patients.

treatment_period.description: The three time periods corresponding to no treatment (before), aspirin treatment (during), and no treatment (after), serving as the independent variable for paired comparisons or two-way ANOVA.

sample_size.description: Number of patients with chronic skin disorders in the open trial.
